codebase_patterns.framework: Python 3.11+ with Click CLI, Pydantic v2
codebase_patterns.state_management: Pydantic models for data validation and serialization
common_mistakes_to_avoid: Always validate tarfile paths before extraction to prevent path traversal
Add file size limits before extracting archives
Filter out symlinks in tarfile extraction
Set explicit file permissions on tarfile members (0o644 for files, 0o755 for executables)
Use specific exception types, not bare except Exception
Use Optional[] type hints for nullable return values
Resolve paths to absolute before security checks

security_patterns: Path traversal protection for all file extraction operations
File size limits before JSON/tarfile loading (MAX_PACKAGE_SIZE=100MB, MAX_FILE_SIZE=10MB)
Explicit TLS verification in HTTP clients
Safe file permissions on created tarfiles (0o644/0o755)
Use filter='data' parameter for tarfile.open() on Python 3.12+
Validate each tarfile member path with member_path.is_relative_to(output_dir)
testing_patterns: Use pytest fixtures for sample data
Test security boundaries (path traversal, symlinks, size limits)
Use tmp_path fixture for file operations in tests
Test both positive and negative cases for validation
